parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'siren', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.siren }] }], properties: ['name', 'siren'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Résoudre owner ID').item.json; const props = { name: d.company_name, phone: d.company_phone, website: d.company_website, address: d.company_address, siren: d.siren, siret_siege: d.siret, type_entreprise: d.type_entreprise, numero_tva: d.numero_tva, capital_social: d.capital_social, forme_juridique: d.forme_juridique, ca_decidento: d.chiffre_affaires, effectif_decidento: d.effectif, convention_collective: d.convention_collective, source_decidento_url: d.source_url }; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'decidento_contact_id', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.decidento_contact_id }] }], properties: ['firstname', 'lastname', 'decidento_contact_id', 'statut_prospection_decidento'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Fusionner company_id').first().json; const props = { firstname: d.contact_firstname, lastname: d.contact_lastname, jobtitle: d.contact_position, address: d.contact_address, titre_decidento: d.contact_title_tag, statut_prospection_decidento: d.status_enum, commercial_decidento: d.commercial_enum, source_decidento_url: d.source_url, decidento_contact_id: d.decidento_contact_id }; if (d.contact_phone) props.phone = d.contact_phone; if (d.contact_linkedin) props.hs_linkedin_url = d.contact_linkedin; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Fusionner company_id').first().json; const props = { firstname: d.contact_firstname, lastname: d.contact_lastname, jobtitle: d.contact_position, address: d.contact_address, titre_decidento: d.contact_title_tag, statut_prospection_decidento: d.status_enum, commercial_decidento: d.commercial_enum, source_decidento_url: d.source_url, decidento_contact_id: d.decidento_contact_id }; if (d.contact_email) props.email = d.contact_email; if (d.contact_phone) props.phone = d.contact_phone; if (d.contact_linkedin) props.hs_linkedin_url = d.contact_linkedin; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props }); })() }}
[{"associationCategory": "HUBSPOT_DEFINED", "associationTypeId": 279}]

={{ (() => { const d = $('Fusionner contact_id').first().json; const dealname = (d.contact_firstname + ' ' + d.contact_lastname).trim() + ' — ' + (d.company_name || ''); const props = { dealname: dealname, pipeline: '3625113819', dealstage: d.pipeline_stage_id || '4978411759' }; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; const associations = []; if (d.contact_id) associations.push({ to: { id: parseInt(d.contact_id) }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 3 }] }); if (d.company_id) associations.push({ to: { id: parseInt(d.company_id) }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 341 }] }); return JSON.stringify({ properties: props, associations: associations }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Fusionner contact_id').first().json; const rdvDate = new Date(d.rdv_date); const props = { hs_task_subject: 'RDV avec ' + d.contact_firstname + ' ' + d.contact_lastname + ' (' + d.company_name + ')', hs_task_body: 'Rendez-vous planifié depuis Decidento\nDate : ' + rdvDate.toLocaleString('fr-FR') + '\nCommercial : ' + d.commercial_raw, hs_task_status: 'NOT_STARTED', hs_task_priority: 'HIGH', hs_timestamp: rdvDate.toISOString() }; if (d.owner_id) props.hubspot_owner_id = d.owner_id; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props, associations: [{ to: { id: parseInt(d.contact_id) }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 204 }] }, { to: { id: parseInt($('Créer Deal Prospection').first().json.body.id) }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 216 }] }] }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, contact_id: $json.contact_id, company_name: $json.company_name, deal_created: true, emails_sent: { confirmation: $json.send_confirmation_email, offer: $json.send_offer_email } }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({Messages:[{From:{Email:"contact@stafy.fr",Name:$json.commercial_name},ReplyTo:{Email:$json.commercial_email,Name:$json.commercial_name},To:[{Email:$json.contact_email,Name:$json.contact_firstname+" "+($json.contact_lastname||"")}],Subject:$json.email1_subject,TemplateID:7813996,TemplateLanguage:true,Variables:{contact_firstname:($json.contact_firstname||"").split(" ").map(function(w){return w.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+w.slice(1).toLowerCase()}).join(" "),company_name:($json.company_name||"").split(" ").map(function(w){return w.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+w.slice(1).toLowerCase()}).join(" "),"rendez-vous":$json.rdv_date_formatted||"",commercial_name:$json.commercial_name,commercial_title:$json.commercial_title,commercial_phone:$json.commercial_phone,commercial_email:$json.commercial_email,commercial_website:$json.commercial_website,url_meeting:$json.url_meeting||"",brochure:$json.brochure||""},CustomID:"formaxe-conf-"+$json.contact_id}]}) }}

={{ (() => { const d = $('Générer signature').first().json; return JSON.stringify({ properties: { hs_email_direction: "EMAIL", hs_email_status: "SENT", hs_email_subject: d.email1_subject, hs_email_text: (d.email1_text || "").substring(0, 65535), hs_timestamp: new Date().toISOString()}, associations: [{ to: { id: d.contact_id }, types: [{ associationCategory: "HUBSPOT_DEFINED", associationTypeId: 198 }] }, { to: { id: parseInt($('Créer Deal Prospection').first().json.body.id) }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 186 }] }] }); })() }}
